summary: RouteActionModal feature testing completed successfully. All modal functionality, state updates, and action buttons work as expected. Backend APIs continue to pass all tests.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with date mocking for Monday route
context_for_next_testing_agent: RouteActionModal feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) Modal opens when pending item clicked, detail drawer opens when visited item clicked. 2) All modal elements present: title 'İşlemi Seç', 3 action buttons (Konum/Mesajlar/Fatura Oluştur), label 'Fatura oluşturmadan devam et', 3 single-select options, 'Seç' button. 3) Close on outside click and ESC key work. 4) Single-select behavior works correctly. 5) Confirm logic: 'visited' and 'visited_without_invoice' move item to visited list; 'not_visited' keeps item in pending. 6) Action buttons: Konum opens Google Maps with coordinates; Mesajlar shows toast if no phone; Fatura Oluştur shows fallback toast. 7) Summary bar counts update correctly. 8) All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

confirm_logic_tests.visited_moves_to_visited_list: PASS - Item moved, summary updated, toast shown
confirm_logic_tests.visited_without_invoice_moves_to_visited: PASS - Item moved, summary updated, toast shown
confirm_logic_tests.not_visited_keeps_in_pending: PASS - Item stayed in pending, toast shown

action_button_tests.konum_button: PASS - Opens Google Maps with coordinates (https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=41.0509557272422,28.99903988817255)
action_button_tests.mesajlar_button: PASS - Shows fallback toast 'Mesaj akışı henüz bağlı değil' when no phone
action_button_tests.fatura_olustur_button: PASS - Shows fallback toast 'X için fatura oluşturma akışı henüz bağlı değil'

toast_messages_verified: Nokta fatura oluşturmadan gidilmiş olarak işaretlendi
